tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Excuse me[/tab]
[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Ha Ha Ha There we go[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Gb/Db[/ch]          [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
I've seen the world, been to many  places[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Gb/Db[/ch]         [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Made lots of friends, many different races[/tab]
C#M7sus2
I've had such fun around the world it's true
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
African skies with a Nairobi mood[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj9[/ch]                        [ch]Ebsus4/Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
I fell asleep in Tuscany and dreamed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
The one thing missing was you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Runaway  with me my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Runaway  with me my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2]
C#M7sus2
I woke up with an Australian breeze
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
And danced the dance with Aborigines[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj9[/ch]
Oh, under the moon glow, down in Mexico[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebsus4/Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
I dreamed, one thing was missing that's you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Runaway  with me my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Runaway  with me my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Gb/Db[/ch]     [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
We'll sail the waters of many  colors[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Gb/Db[/ch]              [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
Won't need no compass, love will guide our way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Gb/Db[/ch]           [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
Don't need nobody, long as we got each other[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Gb/Db[/ch]            [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
No need to hurry, we've got every day[/tab]
C#M7sus2
I want to share the world with you, you see
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Springtime in Paris feels so good to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj9[/ch]                          [ch]Ebsus4/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
Oh, this is for me reality, so please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
Make all my wishes come true[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Runaway  with me my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Db[/ch] [ch]Gb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Ab7[/ch]
  And I just know we'll have a good time, yeah my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Ab7[/ch]
  And I just know we'll have a good time, yeah  my love[/tab]
                                             (Oh, please come with me)
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab7[/ch]
And I just know we'll have a good time, yeah  my love[/tab]
                                            (It'll be fun walking in the rain in Spain)
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab7[/ch]
And I just know we'll have a good time, yeah  yeah[/tab]
                                            (Ooh, didn't quite hit the note!That wasn't such a good time!)
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab7[/ch]
And I just know we'll have a good time, yeah  yeah[/tab]
                                            (Don't you think so? I do!)
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7/B[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
And I just know we'll have a good time, yeah[/tab]
